content: Illustrative Moody's-style issuer credit assessment for Helios Utilities, dated 2025-11-13 on Q3 fundamentals as of 2025-09-30. This assessment applies a parent-support uplift for Helios's membership in a larger utility group, lifting the standalone view by one notch to Baa1. The leverage and interest-coverage inputs match the other anchor; the higher notch is a methodology choice about group support, not a difference in fundamentals.
